mapper.sql: a.account_id, a.phone, a.real_name AS real_name_cipher, a.real_name_verified, a.status
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
FROM t_account a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.account_id = a.account_id WHERE a.status = 1 AND ( a.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.real_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nick_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY a.account_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT
FROM t_account a JOIN sys_user u ON u.account_id = a.account_id AND u.status = '0' JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE a.status = 1 AND r.role_key = #{roleKey} AND ( a.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.real_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nick_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY a.account_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM t_account a WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.account_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT
FROM t_account a JOIN sys_user u ON u.account_id = a.account_id AND u.status = '0' JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE a.status = 1 AND r.role_key = #{roleKey} ORDER BY a.account_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM t_account a WHERE a.account_id = #{accountId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM t_account a WHERE a.phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: u.user_id, u.account_id, u.dept_id, d.tenant_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, d.dept_type, d.dept_category, d.dept_name, r.role_id, r.role_key, r.role_name, COALESCE(ur.effective_data_scope, r.fixed_data_scope, r.default_data_scope) AS effective_data_scope
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.account_id = #{accountId} AND u.status = '0' ORDER BY u.user_id ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.account_id = #{accountId} AND u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT building_id FROM ( SELECT ub.building_id FROM sys_user_building ub WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND ub.status = 1 UNION SELECT dbs.building_id FROM sys_dept_building_scope dbs JOIN ( SELECT ugds.grid_dept_id AS dept_id FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = #{userId} AND ugds.status = 1 UNION SELECT u.dept_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = u.user_id AND ugds.status = 1 ) ) grid_dept ON grid_dept.dept_id = dbs.dept_id JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = #{userId} JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key = 'GRID_MEMBER' AND dbs.status = 1 ) scoped ORDER BY building_id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, building_id FROM sys_dept_building_scope WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY tenant_id ASC, building_id ASC

SELECT dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, dept_type, dept_category, tenant_id FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{communityDeptId} AND dept_type = 5 AND dept_category = 'G' AND status = '0' ORDER BY order_num ASC, dept_id ASC

WITH assigned_grid AS ( SELECT ugds.grid_dept_id AS dept_id FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = #{userId} AND ugds.status = 1 UNION SELECT u.dept_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = u.user_id AND ugds.status = 1 ) ) SELECT d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.dept_type, d.dept_category, d.tenant_id FROM assigned_grid ag JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = ag.dept_id WHERE d.status = '0' AND d.dept_type = 5 AND d.dept_category = 'G' ORDER BY d.order_num ASC, d.dept_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, building_id FROM c_owner_property
WHERE tenant_id IN
#{tenantId}
WHERE 1 = 0
ORDER BY tenant_id ASC, building_id ASC
SELECT tenant_id FROM sys_dept_tenant_scope WHERE dept_id = #{communityDeptId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY tenant_id ASC
SELECT dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, dept_type, dept_category, tenant_id FROM sys_dept WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT u.user_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.status = '0' UNION SELECT ugds.user_id FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = ugds.user_id WHERE ugds.grid_dept_id = #{deptId} AND ugds.status = 1 AND u.status = '0' ) bound_users
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept_building_scope SET status = 2, updated_at = now() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept_building_scope (dept_id, tenant_id, building_id, assigned_by, status) SELECT DISTINCT #{deptId}, #{tenantId}, #{buildingId}, #{assignedBy}, 1 FROM c_owner_property op WHERE op.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND op.building_id = #{buildingId} ON CONFLICT (dept_id, tenant_id, building_id) DO UPDATE SET assigned_by = EXCLUDED.assigned_by, status = 1, updated_at = now()
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_grid_dept_scope SET status = 2, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_grid_dept_scope (user_id, grid_dept_id, assigned_by, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gridDeptId}, #{assignedBy}, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_id, grid_dept_id) DO UPDATE SET assigned_by = EXCLUDED.assigned_by, status = 1, updated_at = now()
INSERT INTO sys_user (account_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, status) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, '0')

INSERT INTO t_account (phone, real_name, real_name_verified, status) VALUES ( #{phone}, #{realName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{realNameVerified}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_account SET last_active_identity_id = #{identityId}, last_active_identity_type = #{identityType}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, dept_type, dept_category, tenant_id, order_num, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{ancestors}, #{deptName}, 5, 'G', #{tenantId}, #{orderNum}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET dept_name = #{deptName}, update_time = now() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND dept_type = 5 AND dept_category = 'G' AND status = '0'
UPDATE sys_dept SET status = '1', update_time = now() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND dept_type = 5 AND dept_category = 'G' AND status = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, effective_data_scope, granted_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{effectiveDataScope}, #{grantedBy})
